sevenDay.synopsis: No issues for the AM, but showers and ISOLD TS will move in for the PM and could linger well into the N1. IFR cigs set up by 22- 23L. Tomorrow looks unsettled with IFR cigs in the AM and showers/TS off and on for the AM and PM periods. Once again, IFR sets up for the N1. Sunday and Monday will be similar with AM/N1 IFR and waves of showers/TS moving thru. Finally by Tuesday, we'll clear up and dry out. The rest of the forecast period looks dandy with VFR and NEG hazards.
sevenDay.title: 7-DAY OUTLOOK: 08 MAY - 14 MAY
